'''''Vigiliance''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] that formed part of the [[Corrupter Task Force|''Corrupter'' Task Force]]. She was commanded by Captain [[Nemlix]].

The ''Vigiliance'' assisted the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial II-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] in its pursuit of the [[Defiance Task Force]] after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. It was present with its native force when the fleet was [[Recon on Corrupter Task Force|raided]] by two [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], one of them flown by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]].

The ''Vigiliance'' either joined the ''Corrupter'' on its duties in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] after the [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] fled or departed on other duties.

==Behind the scenes==
The destruction of the ''Vigiliance'' is an optional objective for the player.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
